channel.title: cybellum — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by cybellum (cybellum).

item.title: CVE-2023-42419 · 3.8 LOW — Improper Management of Cryptographic Keys in the Maintenance Server in QCOW Air-Gapped Distribution (China Edition)
item.description: Maintenance Server, in Cybellum's QCOW air-gapped distribution (China Edition), versions 2.15.5 through 2.27, was compiled with a hard-coded private cryptographic key. An attacker with administrative privileges & access to the air-gapped server could…

item.title: CVE-2022-38132 · 8.2 HIGH — Command injection vulnerability in Linksys MR8300 router while Registration to DDNS Service. By specifying username and password, an attacker connected to the router's web interface can execute arbitrary OS commands.
item.description: Command injection vulnerability in Linksys MR8300 router while Registration to DDNS Service. By specifying username and password, an attacker connected to the router's web interface can execute arbitrary OS commands. The username and password fields…
